faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Bulls Head?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Bulls Head typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and necessary cleanup or damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Bulls Head, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Bulls Head due to the area's mature trees, proximity to green spaces, and abundant food sources from residential garbage and pet food. The neighborhood's mix of older and newer homes provides numerous den sites, especially in attics and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Bulls Head home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Bulls Head service calls within 24 hours and can begin trapping immediately. Most raccoon removals are completed within 3-7 days, though larger infestations or situations involving raccoon babies may take up to two weeks to ensure all animals are safely and humanely removed.

faqs.question: Do you offer raccoon exclusion and prevention services in Bulls Head?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. After removing raccoons from your Bulls Head property, we provide comprehensive exclusion services including sealing entry points, installing chimney caps, reinforcing vents, and securing potential access areas. We also offer sanitation services to remove contaminated insulation and droppings, plus recommendations to prevent future raccoon problems.
